mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, E2.* FROM ( SELECT E.EQ_ID AS eqId, E.EQ_NAME AS eqName, E.EQ_STATUS AS eqStatus, E.EQ_SDATE AS eqSdate, E.EQ_WPID AS eqWpid,
W.WP_NAME AS wpName, S.EQ_STATUS_NAME AS eqStatusName,
NVL( ROUND( (SYSDATE- E.EQ_SDATE) * 24, 1 ), 0 ) AS totalTime,
NVL( ROUND( SUM( ( NVL(R.EQ_RUN_ETIME, SYSDATE) - R.EQ_RUN_STIME ) * 24 ), 1 ), 0 ) AS runTime,
NVL( TO_CHAR( ROUND( ( SUM( ( NVL(R.EQ_RUN_ETIME, SYSDATE) - R.EQ_RUN_STIME ) * 24 ) / NULLIF( (SYSDATE - E.EQ_SDATE) * 24, 0 ) ) * 100, 1 ) ) || '%', '0%' ) AS runRate
FROM EQUIPMENT E
LEFT JOIN EQ_STATUS S ON E.EQ_STATUS = S.EQ_STATUS_NO
LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE W ON E.EQ_WPID = W.WP_ID
LEFT JOIN EQ_RUN_LOG R ON E.EQ_ID = R.EQ_RUN_EQID
E.EQ_USAGE = 'Y'
AND E.EQ_WPID = #{eqWpid}
AND E.EQ_STATUS IN
#{status}
AND E.EQ_STATUS = #{eqStatus}
AND ( UPPER(E.EQ_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(E.EQ_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
GROUP BY E.EQ_ID, E.EQ_NAME, E.EQ_STATUS, E.EQ_SDATE, E.EQ_WPID, W.WP_NAME, S.EQ_STATUS_NAME
ORDER BY E.EQ_ID DESC
) E2 ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EQUIPMENT WHERE EQ_STATUS = #{eqStatus} AND EQ_USAGE = 'Y'

SELECT E.EQ_ID AS eqId, E.EQ_NAME AS eqName, E.EQ_STATUS AS eqStatus, E.EQ_SDATE + (9/24) AS eqSdate, E.EQ_WPID AS eqWpid, E.EQ_VENDOR AS eqVendor, E.EQ_MANAGER AS eqManager,
S.EQ_STATUS_NAME AS eqStatusName,
W.WP_NAME AS wpName, WT.WP_TYPE_NAME AS wpTypeName,
V.VENDOR_NAME AS eqVendorName, EMP.EMP_NAME AS eqManagerName,
NVL( ROUND( (SYSDATE - E.EQ_SDATE) * 24, 1 ), 0 ) AS totalTime,
NVL( ROUND( SUM( ( NVL(R.EQ_RUN_ETIME, SYSDATE) - R.EQ_RUN_STIME ) * 24 ), 1 ), 0 ) AS runTime,
NVL( TO_CHAR( ROUND( ( SUM( ( NVL(R.EQ_RUN_ETIME, SYSDATE) - R.EQ_RUN_STIME ) * 24 ) /
NULLIF( (SYSDATE - E.EQ_SDATE) * 24, 0 ) ) * 100, 1 ) ) || '%', '0%' ) AS runRate
FROM EQUIPMENT E
LEFT JOIN EQ_STATUS S ON E.EQ_STATUS = S.EQ_STATUS_NO
LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE W ON E.EQ_WPID = W.WP_ID
LEFT JOIN VENDOR V ON E.EQ_VENDOR = V.VENDOR_ID
LEFT JOIN EMP EMP ON E.EQ_MANAGER = EMP.EMP_ID
LEFT JOIN WP_TYPE WT ON W.WP_TYPE = WT.WP_TYPE_NO
LEFT JOIN EQ_RUN_LOG R ON E.EQ_ID = R.EQ_RUN_EQID
WHERE E.EQ_ID = #{eqId} AND E.EQ_USAGE = 'Y'
GROUP BY E.EQ_ID, E.EQ_NAME, E.EQ_STATUS, E.EQ_SDATE, E.EQ_WPID, E.EQ_VENDOR, E.EQ_MANAGER, S.EQ_STATUS_NAME, W.WP_NAME, WT.WP_TYPE_NAME, V.VENDOR_NAME, EMP.EMP_NAME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EQ_LOG WHERE ELOG_EQID = #{eqId} AND ELOG_USAGE = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, L2.* FROM ( SELECT L.ELOG_ID AS elogId, L.ELOG_EQID AS elogEqid, L.ELOG_SDATE AS elogSdate, L.ELOG_EDATE AS elogEdate, L.ELOG_REASON AS elogReason, L.ELOG_CONTENT AS elogContent, L.ELOG_RESULT AS elogResult, L.ELOG_WORKER AS elogWorker, EMP.EMP_NAME AS elogWorkerName, L.ELOG_USAGE AS elogUsage
FROM EQ_LOG L
LEFT JOIN EMP EMP ON L.ELOG_WORKER = EMP.EMP_ID
WHERE L.ELOG_EQID = #{eqId} AND L.ELOG_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY L.ELOG_SDATE DESC ) L2 ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
SELECT WP_ID AS wpId, WP_NAME AS wpName FROM WORKPLACE where wp_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY WP_ID ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, R2.* FROM ( SELECT EQ_RUN_NO AS eqRunNo, EQ_RUN_EQID AS eqRunEqid, EQ_RUN_STIME + (9/24) AS eqRunStime, EQ_RUN_ETIME + (9/24) AS eqRunEtime, EQ_STOP_REASON AS eqStopReason FROM EQ_RUN_LOG WHERE EQ_RUN_EQID = #{eqId} ORDER BY EQ_RUN_STIME DESC ) R2 ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}

SELECT EMP_ID AS "eqManager", EMP_NAME AS "eqManagerName" FROM EMP
AND ( UPPER(EMP_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%')
OR
UPPER(EMP_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') )
ORDER BY EMP_ID

SELECT VENDOR_ID AS "eqVendor", VENDOR_NAME AS "eqVendorName" FROM VENDOR
WHERE VENDOR_TYPE = 'E'
AND ( UPPER(VENDOR_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%')
OR
UPPER(VENDOR_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') )
ORDER BY VENDOR_ID
SELECT WP_ID AS wpId, WP_NAME AS wpName FROM WORKPLACE WHERE WP_TYPE = #{wpType} and wp_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY WP_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EQUIPMENT ( EQ_ID, EQ_NAME, EQ_STATUS, EQ_SDATE, EQ_WPID, EQ_VENDOR, EQ_MANAGER, EQ_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'EQ' || EQ_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{eqName}, 20, SYSDATE, #{eqWpid}, #{eqVendor}, #{eqManager}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO EQ_LOG ( ELOG_ID, ELOG_EQID, ELOG_SDATE, ELOG_EDATE, ELOG_REASON, ELOG_CONTENT, ELOG_RESULT, ELOG_WORKER, ELOG_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'ELOG' || ELOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{elogEqid}, #{elogSdate}, #{elogEdate}, #{elogReason}, #{elogContent}, #{elogResult}, #{elogWorker}, 'Y' )
INSERT INTO EQ_RUN_LOG ( EQ_RUN_NO, EQ_RUN_EQID, EQ_RUN_STIME, EQ_RUN_ETIME, EQ_STOP_REASON ) VALUES ( EQ_RUN_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{eqId}, SYSDATE, NULL, NULL )
